Name: MODEL_LINK_LOD_TYPE_PARAM
Description: Defines level-of-detail (LOD) switching distances and rendering thresholds for linked model systems, including draw, shadow, and motion blur visibility ranges.

Fields.Name: LOD Switch Distance Level 1
Fields.Description: Distance at which the model switches to LOD level 1.

Fields.Name: LOD Switch Distance Level 2
Fields.Description: Distance at which the model switches to LOD level 2.

Fields.Name: LOD Switch Distance Level 3
Fields.Description: Distance at which the model switches to LOD level 3.

Fields.Name: LOD Switch Distance Level 4
Fields.Description: Distance at which the model switches to LOD level 4.

Fields.Name: Draw Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which the model is rendered.

Fields.Name: Shadow Cast Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which the model casts shadows.

Fields.Name: Motion Blur Enable Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which motion blur effects become active for the model.
